identity.name: BabyCare
identity.mission: To provide a seamless, comforting, and medically reliable platform for mothers and doctors, blending emotional warmth with clinical precision.
principles: Fusion: Maternal Warmth (Soft shapes, warm tones) + Medical Precision (Clean lines, clear data)
Emotion First: Every screen should feel like a supportive hug, not a cold clinic.
Clarity: Medical data must be instantly readable, never cluttered.
Inclusivity: Design for diverse families and medical professionals.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-white font-bold px-8 py-3 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary/20 hover:border-primary/50 font-bold px-8 py-3 transition-all
buttons.ghost: rounded-full text-muted-foreground hover:text-primary hover:bg-pink-50 font-semibold px-6 py-2 transition-all

cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm border border-pink-50 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.feature: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-3xl p-8 border border-pink-100 shadow-sm hover:border-pink-300 transition-all group

inputs.default: rounded-xl border-pink-200 bg-pink-50/30 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-300 focus:border-transparent transition-all px-4 py-3 text-gray-700 placeholder:text-gray-400

dashboard.sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 border-r border-pink-100 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-xl h-screen sticky top-0

marketing.hero: min-h-[90vh] flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden

hero_mother.description: Hero section image, mother swaddling baby, conveying warmth and protection.

chatbot.name: Gemini Health Assistant
chatbot.ui_style: Floating button with sparkle icon. Chat window uses chat bubbles: Pink (User) vs Teal (Bot).

maps.style: Use a custom Google Maps style (Silver or Desaturated) to match the soft theme. Avoid default high-contrast map colors.

documents.card_style: File card with icon (PDF/Doc), filename, and upload date. Hover effect: lift and show actions (Download/Delete).
documents.upload_zone: Dashed border-2 border-pink-300 rounded-3xl bg-pink-50/50 p-12 text-center hover:bg-pink-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: `yarn add lucide-react recharts react-day-picker date-fns clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion`
THEME_SETUP: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the specific colors defined in `design_guidelines.json`. Do NOT rely on default colors.

COMPONENT_OVERRIDE: For Shadcn components (Calendar, Dialog, Sheet), heavily customize the `className` to remove the default 'black/white' look and apply the 'Soft Pink' aesthetic (e.g., rounded-3xl, pink borders).
LAYOUT_RULE: Use the 'Bento Grid' for dashboards. Mix 2x2 squares with 1x2 tall cards for visual interest.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure text contrast. If using white text on pink buttons, ensure the pink is #E91E63 or darker. For body text, use #37474F, not #000000.
IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs. Do NOT use placeholders.
NAVIGATION: Create distinct layouts for 'Parent Dashboard' and 'Doctor Dashboard'. They should share the Design System but have different sidebar items.
MARKETING_PAGE: Build a warm, emotional landing page. Use 'Blob' shapes (SVG) in the background to soften the edges of images.
MAPS: Use `react-google-maps/api` or `google-map-react`. Placeholder implementation is fine if API key is missing, but UI must be ready.
CHAT: Implement the Chat UI with `react-markdown` support for Gemini responses.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
